phase_history.notes: Defined Nova Console as a flagship modular analog channel environment for fast, musical, luxury workflow across high track counts.
Mapped signal flow, module behaviors, console modes, quality modes, and dynamic module unloading strategy.
Implemented a dark graphite, amber-glow, modular card UI with a central analog EQ hero display and animated metering.
Implemented processor/editor architecture with modular bypass, mode-aware nonlinear behavior, analog engine, and scalable quality settings.
